mapper.select: SELECT id, username, nickname, role, login_ip as loginIp, login_time as loginTime, last_activity_time as lastActivityTime, browser, os, status FROM online_users ORDER BY last_activity_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, username, nickname, role, login_ip as loginIp, login_time as loginTime, last_activity_time as lastActivityTime, browser, os, status FROM online_users WHERE id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM online_users WHERE id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO online_users (id, username, nickname, role, login_ip, login_time, last_activity_time, browser, os, status) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastActivityTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{browser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{os, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE username = VALUES(username), nickname = VALUES(nickname), role = VALUES(role), login_ip = VALUES(login_ip), login_time = VALUES(login_time), last_activity_time = VALUES(last_activity_time), browser = VALUES(browser), os = VALUES(os), status = VALUES(status)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_login_log WHERE DATE(login_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_login_log WHERE login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days, jdbcType=INTEGER} DAY)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(login_time, '%H:00') as timePoint, COUNT(*) as loginCount FROM user_login_log WHERE login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours, jdbcType=INTEGER} HOUR) GROUP BY timePoint ORDER BY timePoint

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(activity_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as activityTime, activity_content as activityContent FROM user_activity_log WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND activity_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days, jdbcType=INTEGER} DAY) ORDER BY activity_time DESC
